purpose: Reusable scaffold for LP, MILP, MIQP, QP, convex, nonlinear, and mixed-integer nonlinear optimization deployments in OR workflows.
intended_use: Copy this folder into a deployment workspace when the selected method is solver-based mathematical programming.
Fill formulation, data mapping, solver adapter, solve loop, evaluation, and run-record contracts for the confirmed model.
Use structured run records to capture solver status, objective, bound, gap, feasibility, runtime, and generated output files.
non_goals: This asset is not a complete runnable model.
This asset does not prescribe one solver, modeling package, or model class.
This asset does not contain task data, licensed solver credentials, or domain-specific formulations.
This asset must not be used to generate toy or minimal examples that omit real data mapping, constraints, solver status, bounds, gaps, progress output, and feasibility validation.

top_level_paths.formulations: Model family catalog and formulation notes.
top_level_paths.evaluation: Solution validation, bounds, and benchmark protocol.
top_level_paths.scripts: Foreground solve, user-facing run, and compact result-collection templates.
